hero.title: Mood Journal
hero.description: Record today’s mood, review recent entries, and reflect privately in your browser.

differences.title: Keep daily moods and reflections connected
differences.description: Mood Journal combines one editable daily entry with recent reflections and a current streak.

items.title: Record
items.description: Capture today’s mood level, label, note, and optional tags.

items.title: Review
items.description: Search, filter, and revisit recent date-keyed entries.

items.title: Reflect
items.description: Build a consistent private reflection habit in this browser.

feel.title: A calm path from mood to reflection
feel.description: The journal keeps today’s entry, recent reflections, and current streak together.

items.title: Capture today
items.description: Record a mood level and add as much or as little context as needed.

items.title: Review entries
items.description: Find recent reflections by mood, note text, or tags.

items.title: Keep it private
items.description: Store journal entries only in the current browser.

audiences.title: Who uses Mood Journal
audiences.description: Useful for anyone building a simple and private reflection routine.

items.title: Reflective users
items.description: Capture mood context through short daily notes.

items.title: Routine builders
items.description: Maintain a streak of consistent daily entries.

items.title: Everyday users
items.description: Keep lightweight mood records without an account.

resourceSection.title: Mood journaling essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed to record, review, and reflect on daily moods.

items.title: Today’s entry
items.description: Save or update one date-keyed mood entry for today.

items.title: Recent reflections
items.description: Search and filter entries stored in this browser.

items.title: Current streak
items.description: Count consecutive local dates with a saved entry.

groupedSection.title: Record and review daily reflections
groupedSection.description: Use one browser-only workflow for private mood journaling.

items.name: Mood details
items.description: Choose a level and add a label, note, and optional tags.

items.name: Daily update
items.description: Save again to update today’s existing entry.

items.name: Search and filter
items.description: Find entries by mood, note text, or tags.

items.name: Private history
items.description: Keep date-keyed entries and streak progress in this browser.

technicalSection.title: Designed for browser mood journaling
technicalSection.description: Mood Journal follows the shared Ansiversa browser-first reference architecture.
items: User-created date-keyed entries stored in localStorage.

finalCta.title: Record and reflect on today’s mood
finalCta.description: Open Mood Journal to create a private daily reflection in your browser.
